title: Concept trace — Multi-View Consistency across the corpus
stumbles: search_nodes with type=Concept returned 0 results for 'multi-view consistency' because the corpus tracks the topic as an OpenQuestion rather than a Concept node; recovered by dropping the type filter and broadening the search.
summary: Traced 'Multi-View Consistency' through the corpus as a five-stage timeline anchored to NeRF (2020), NeuS (2021), DROID-SLAM (2021), 3DGS / MonoGS (2023), and 2DGS / MVSplat (2024). Used search_facts + timeline tools to pull predicate-level evidence (evaluated_on, introduces_property, raises_question). Surfaced the fast-motion robustness gap as the open question that connects the splatting and SLAM branches.
